headline: Can Fidelity National Beat Q1 Earnings on Banking Solutions Strength?
summary: FIS heads into Q1 earnings with Banking Solutions revenues expected to rise 37.7% and adjusted EBITDA to jump 42%: can it deliver a beat?

headline: OppFi Inc. (OPFI) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: OppFi (OPFI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.69% and +2.69%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
